name: io.github.codespar/mcp-iniciador
description: Open Finance BR PISP — Pix payment initiation. Operator triggers a payer-to-payee transfer through Iniciador's PISP license; payer authorizes once at their bank's app and the payment fires from the payer's own bank account. Alternative to merchant-acquirer rails (Asaas / Mercado Pago) when the payer's bank should be the source of funds.

environment_variables.name: INICIADOR_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: API key issued from the Iniciador dashboard — sent as X-API-KEY header

tools.name: list_institutions
tools.description: List Open Finance institutions enabled for payment initiation through Iniciador

tools.name: create_consent
tools.description: Create a payment-initiation consent scoped to institution + amount + creditor

tools.name: get_consent
tools.description: Get a consent with status + authorizationUrl + expiresAt

tools.name: revoke_consent
tools.description: Revoke a consent before it's consumed

tools.name: get_authorization_url
tools.description: Re-fetch the authorization URL for an existing consent

tools.name: create_payment
tools.description: Trigger the Pix payment against an AUTHORIZED consent

tools.name: get_payment
tools.description: Get a payment with status + endToEndId + settledAt

tools.name: list_payments
tools.description: List payments with status / institution / date-range filters

tools.name: cancel_payment
tools.description: Cancel a PENDING or scheduled payment before settlement
